title: Nicholas II of Russia becomes King of Poland
fact: Nicholas II was Emperor of Russia, King of Poland and Grand Duke of Finland from 1 November 1894 until his abdication in 1917.

title: Henry III of France becomes King of Poland
fact: Henry III was King of France from 1574 until his assassination in 1589 and, as Henry of Valois, King of Poland and Grand Duke of Lithuania from 1573 to 1575.

title: John III Sobieski becomes King of Poland
fact: John III Sobieski was King of Poland and Grand Duke of Lithuania from 1674 until his death in 1696.

title: Władysław II Jagiełło becomes King of Poland
fact: Jogaila, later Władysław II Jagiełło, was Grand Duke of Lithuania beginning in 1377 and King of Poland from 1386 until his death.

title: Jadwiga I of Poland becomes Queen of Poland
fact: Jadwiga, also known as Hedwig, was the first female monarch of the Kingdom of Poland, as well as its last hereditary ruler.

title: Stanisław August Poniatowski becomes King of Poland
fact: Stanisław II August, known also by his regnal Latin name Stanislaus II Augustus, and as Stanisław August Poniatowski, was King of Poland and Grand Duke of Lithuania from 1764 to 1795, and the last monarch of the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth.

title: Sigismund III Vasa becomes King of Poland
fact: Sigismund III Vasa was King of Poland and Grand Duke of Lithuania from 1587 to 1632 and, as Sigismund, King of Sweden from 1592 to 1599.

title: Casimir III the Great becomes King of Poland
fact: Casimir III the Great reigned as the King of Poland from 1333 to 1370.

title: Augustus II the Strong becomes King of Poland
fact: Augustus II the Strong, was Elector of Saxony as Frederick Augustus I from 1694 as well as King of Poland and Grand Duke of Lithuania from 1697 to 1706 and from 1709 until his death in 1733.

title: Louis I of Hungary becomes King of Poland
fact: Louis I, also known as Louis the Great or Louis the Hungarian, was King of Hungary and Croatia from 1342 and King of Poland from 1370 until his death in 1382.

title: Władysław III of Poland becomes King of Poland
fact: Władysław III of Poland, also known as Ladislaus of Varna, was King of Poland and Supreme Duke of the Grand Duchy of Lithuania from 1434, as well as King of Hungary and Croatia as Vladislaus I from 1440 until his presumed death at the Battle of Varna.

title: John of Bohemia becomes King of Poland
fact: John of Bohemia, also called the Blind or of Luxembourg, was the Count of Luxembourg from 1313 and King of Bohemia from 1310 and titular King of Poland.

title: Augustus III of Poland becomes King of Poland
fact: Augustus III was King of Poland and Grand Duke of Lithuania from 1733 until 1763, as well as Elector of Saxony in the Holy Roman Empire where he was known as Frederick Augustus II.

title: Sigismund II Augustus becomes King of Poland
fact: Sigismund II Augustus was King of Poland and Grand Duke of Lithuania, the son of Sigismund I the Old, whom Sigismund II succeeded in 1548.

title: Władysław IV Vasa becomes King of Poland
fact: Władysław IV Vasa or Ladislaus IV was King of Poland, Grand Duke of Lithuania and claimant of the thrones of Sweden and Russia.

title: Stephen Báthory becomes King of Poland
fact: Stephen Báthory was King of Poland and Grand Duke of Lithuania as well as Prince of Transylvania (1576–1586), after previously being Voivode of Transylvania (1571–1576).

title: Casimir IV Jagiellon becomes King of Poland
fact: Casimir IV was Grand Duke of Lithuania from 1440 and King of Poland from 1447 until his death in 1492.

title: Bolesław I the Brave becomes King of Poland
fact: Bolesław I the Brave, less often known as Bolesław the Great, was Duke of Poland from 992 to 1025 and the first King of Poland in 1025.

title: Sigismund I the Old becomes King of Poland
fact: Sigismund I the Old was King of Poland and Grand Duke of Lithuania from 1506 until his death in 1548.

title: Stanisław Leszczyński becomes King of Poland
fact: Stanisław I Leszczyński, also Anglicized and Latinized as Stanislaus I, was twice King of Poland and Grand Duke of Lithuania, and at various times Prince of Deux-Ponts, Duke of Bar and Duke of Lorraine.

title: John II Casimir Vasa becomes King of Poland
fact: John II Casimir Vasa was King of Poland and Grand Duke of Lithuania from 1648 to his abdication in 1668 as well as a claimant to the throne of Sweden from 1648 to 1660.

title: Anna Jagiellon becomes Queen of Poland
fact: Anna Jagiellon was Queen of Poland and Grand Duchess of Lithuania from 1575 to 1587.

title: Wenceslaus III of Bohemia becomes King of Poland
fact: Wenceslaus III was King of Hungary and Croatia from 1301 to 1305, and King of Bohemia and Poland from 1305.

title: Wenceslaus II of Bohemia becomes King of Poland
fact: Wenceslaus II Přemyslid was King of Bohemia (1278–1305), Duke of Cracow (1291–1305), and King of Poland (1296–1305).

title: Mieszko II becomes King of Poland
fact: Mieszko II Lambert was King of Poland from 1025 to 1031 and Duke from 1032 until his death.

title: John I Albert becomes King of Poland
fact: John I Albert was King of Poland from 1492 to his death and Duke of Głogów from 1491 to 1498.

title: Henry of Bohemia becomes King of Poland
fact: Henry of Gorizia, a member of the House of Gorizia, was Duke of Carinthia and Landgrave of Carniola and Count of Tyrol from 1295 until his death, as well as King of Bohemia, Margrave of Moravia and titular King of Poland in 1306 and again from 1307 until 1310.

title: Alexander Jagiellon becomes King of Poland
fact: Alexander Jagiellon was Grand Duke of Lithuania from 1492 and King of Poland from 1501 until his death in 1506.

title: Michał Korybut Wiśniowiecki becomes King of Poland
fact: Michał Tomasz Wiśniowiecki, also known as Michał Korybut Wiśniowiecki, and under a regal name Michael I, was the ruler of the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth as King of Poland and Grand Duke of Lithuania from 29 September 1669 until his death in 1673.

title: Przemysł II becomes King of Poland
fact: Przemysł II was the Duke of Poznań from 1257–1279, of Greater Poland from 1279 to 1296, of Kraków from 1290 to 1291, and Gdańsk Pomerania (Pomerelia) from 1294 to 1296, and then King of Poland from 1295 until his death.

title: Władysław I the Elbow-high becomes King of Poland
fact: Władysław I Łokietek, in English known as the "Elbow-high" or Ladislaus the Short, was King of Poland from 1320 to 1333, and duke of several of the provinces and principalities in the preceding years.

title: Bolesław II the Generous becomes King of Poland
fact: Bolesław II the Bold, also known as the Generous, was Duke of Poland from 1058 to 1076 and King of Poland from 1076 to 1079.

title: Rudolf I of Bohemia becomes King of Poland
fact: Rudolf I, also known as Rudolf of Habsburg, was a member of the House of Habsburg, the King of Bohemia and titular King of Poland from 1306 until his death.

title: Henry I the Bearded becomes King of Poland
fact: Henry the Bearded was a Polish duke from the Piast dynasty.
